actions_taken.description: ISS-454 updated to pending-human (one-line generate-html.js fix). EXP-011 (tab ordering, generate-html.js) flagged for human application. EXP-015 (WIN-015 alternative) flagged for human comparison.

internal_issues.description: sections.json NOT injected into HTML: generate-html.js checks SECTIONS_AVAILABLE flag via circular dependency — sections.json is never actually used in page generation despite being the source of truth for prose. ONE-LINE FIX: change line 1777 from 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {'

HOL-HIERARCHY: Argument hierarchy inverted — self-contradictions (strongest, dome-parameter-only) should appear before external tests in tab order. EXP-011 output ready with 6 generate-html.js edits needed.
